failure_partition.invalid_plan: unreachable in the confirmed six-request domain
failure_partition.unsupported_request: any adapter, target, precision, manifest, path, state or ring mismatch
failure_partition.inadequate_budget: valid plan plus plan_fits_budget(request, plan) == false
failure_partition.resource_exhaustion: not present in the finite 32-panel constructor
failure_partition.implementation_exception: outside confirmed domain; treated as a defect, never a typed mathematical result

excluded_components: all live Cella Pathfinder providers except dbp_native_released_evaluation
